signals.npcLine: City’s crypto pulse dips; shadows feed on dread and chaos.
signals.questPulse: Market turns sour, chances in falling assets emerge.
signals.worldFeed: Network nodes report fragmented trades amid growing distrust.
signals.clueEvent: Digital rumors hint at vaults loosening their grip.

signals.npcLine: Hacker whispers: AAVE spikes in underground chatter.
signals.questPulse: Extraction ops target volatile assets; high risk, high reward.
signals.worldFeed: Encrypted channels buzz about elusive gains from shifting tokens.
signals.clueEvent: Fragmented data streams reveal bargaining for rare altcoins.

signals.npcLine: Whispers: ASTEROID’s orbit changes—something big approaches.
signals.questPulse: Decode signals hinting at incoming market disruption.
signals.worldFeed: Sensor logs catch erratic activity near token clusters.
signals.clueEvent: Shadow drops encoded hints in dark net forums.

signals.npcLine: PENGU’s cold trail leads to frozen assets—unlock secrets.
signals.questPulse: Dive into data vaults to recover locked value.
signals.worldFeed: Frozen tokens cause glitches, sparks interest in breakers.
signals.clueEvent: Hidden ledgers surface in fragmented blockchain archives.

signals.npcLine: WOJAK figures lurk, trading fears as currency.
signals.questPulse: Hunt unofficial brokers spreading panic and false leads.
signals.worldFeed: Murmurs of manipulation by faceless players rise steadily.
signals.clueEvent: Intercepted chatter hints at fear-driven market ploys.
